questions.q: Who is the author of the story 'Gillu'?
questions.explanation: 'Gillu' की लेखिका महादेवी वर्मा (Mahadevi Varma) हैं।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: What was Gillu?
questions.explanation: गिल्लू एक गिलहरी (squirrel) का बच्चा था।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: What was Gillu's favorite food?
questions.explanation: गिल्लू का सबसे पसंदीदा भोजन काजू (Kaju) था।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Where did the author find the wounded squirrel?
questions.explanation: लेखिका को घायल गिलहरी बरामदे (veranda) में गमले के पास मिली थी।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: What color were Gillu's eyes?
questions.explanation: गिल्लू की आँखें नीली (blue) और कांच की गोलियों जैसी चमकती थीं।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: How many wounds did the squirrel have on its body?
questions.explanation: कौओं के चोंच मारने के कारण गिलहरी के शरीर पर दो (two) घाव थे।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: What was the life span of squirrels, according to the story?
questions.explanation: कहानी के अनुसार गिलहरियों की जीवन अवधि लगभग दो वर्ष (two years) होती है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: When the author was injured in a car accident, how did Gillu behave?
questions.explanation: जब लेखिका अस्पताल में थीं, तो गिल्लू ने अपना प्रिय भोजन काजू भी खाना कम कर दिया था।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Where was Gillu buried after his death?
questions.explanation: गिल्लू को सोनजुही (Sonjuhi) की लता के नीचे दफनाया गया था।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: The author cleaned Gillu's wounds and applied ___.
questions.explanation: लेखिका ने गिल्लू के घावों को साफ किया और पेनिसिलिन मरहम (Penicillin ointment) लगाया।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Who is the author of 'What is Wrong with Indian Films'?
questions.explanation: इस लेख के लेखक महान फिल्म निर्देशक सत्यजीत राय (Satyajit Ray) हैं।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: The first short film in India was produced in ___.
questions.explanation: भारत में पहली लघु फिल्म (short film) 1907 में बनाई गई थी।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: What is the most potent tool of creative expression according to Ray?
questions.explanation: सत्यजीत राय के अनुसार सिनेमा (Cinema) रचनात्मक अभिव्यक्ति का सबसे शक्तिशाली साधन है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Satyajit Ray's famous film 'Pather Panchali' was released in ___.
questions.explanation: उनकी प्रसिद्ध फिल्म 'पाथेर पांचाली' 1955 में रिलीज हुई थी।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: According to the author, what is the main flaw of Indian films?
questions.explanation: लेखक के अनुसार भारतीय फिल्मों में शैलीगत परिपक्वता (stylistic maturity) की कमी है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Indian films are often criticized for blindly copying ___.
questions.explanation: भारतीय फिल्मों की अक्सर हॉलीवुड (Hollywood) की अंधी नकल करने के लिए आलोचना की जाती है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: The first feature film in India was 'Raja Harishchandra' released in ___.
questions.explanation: भारत की पहली फीचर फिल्म 'राजा हरिश्चंद्र' 1913 में रिलीज हुई थी।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: What should be the objective of Indian cinema according to Satyajit Ray?
questions.explanation: राय का मानना था कि सिनेमा को भारतीय जीवन का वास्तविक चित्रण करना चाहिए।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: In the essay, 'raw material' refers to ___.
questions.explanation: लेखक के अनुसार 'Raw material' का अर्थ स्वयं जीवन (life itself) है जिसे फिल्मों में दिखाया जाता है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Indian films should simplify their ___.
questions.explanation: लेखक का सुझाव है कि भारतीय फिल्मों को अपनी तकनीक (technique) को सरल बनाना चाहिए।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Who wrote the poem 'Polythene Bag'?
questions.explanation: 'Polythene Bag' कविता दुर्गा प्रसाद पांडा (Durga Prasad Panda) द्वारा लिखी गई है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Does a polythene bag get dissolved in the earth?
questions.explanation: पॉलिथीन बैग मिट्टी में कभी नहीं घुलता (dissolved) है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: When burnt, what kind of smell does a polythene bag give?
questions.explanation: जलने पर पॉलिथीन बैग से तीखी/चुभने वाली (pungent) गंध निकलती है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: What happens when a polythene bag is left to itself?
questions.explanation: जब इसे ऐसे ही छोड़ दिया जाता है, तो यह पर्यावरण को प्रदूषित (pollutes) करता है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: The poet compares the polythene bag to ___.
questions.explanation: कवि ने पॉलिथीन बैग की तुलना मनुष्य के दुःख या चोट (hurt/grief) से की है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: How does 'hurt' behave like a polythene bag?
questions.explanation: जैसे पॉलिथीन खत्म नहीं होता, वैसे ही मन की चोट या दुःख भी अंदर दबा रहता है और बार-बार लौट आता है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: What noise does a polythene bag make when touched?
questions.explanation: छूने पर पॉलिथीन बैग से 'Squeaky' (चरमराहट भरी) आवाज आती है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Where does the 'germs of disease' grow in the context of the poem?
questions.explanation: कविता के अनुसार, बीमारी के कीटाणु कूड़ेदान (garbage bin) के भीतर पनपते हैं।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: The word 'hushed' in the poem implies ___.
questions.explanation: 'Hushed' का अर्थ है शांत या दबा हुआ दुःख।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: What is the central theme of the poem 'Polythene Bag'?
questions.explanation: यह कविता पर्यावरणीय प्रदूषण और मानवीय पीड़ा के बीच समानता दिखाती है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Who wrote 'Thinner Than a Crescent'?
questions.explanation: 'Thinner Than a Crescent' के रचयिता मैथिल कोकिल विद्यापति (Vidyapati) हैं।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: About whose grief is the poem 'Thinner Than a Crescent'?
questions.explanation: यह कविता राधा के विरह और दुःख के बारे में है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Radha is getting thinner because of ___.
questions.explanation: कृष्ण से अलग होने के दुःख (Separation) के कारण राधा दुबली होती जा रही हैं।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Radha is compared to the crescent on the ___ day of the dark fortnight.
questions.explanation: राधा की तुलना अंधेरे पखवाड़े के आठवें (eighth) दिन के चंद्रमा से की गई है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Who goes to Lord Krishna with a message?
questions.explanation: राधा की सहेली (friend) कृष्ण के पास संदेश लेकर जाती है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: What is the meaning of 'Crescent'?
questions.explanation: 'Crescent' का अर्थ है चंद्रमा का बढ़ता या घटता हुआ अर्धचंद्राकार रूप।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Radha's tears have carved a ___.
questions.explanation: कविता में कहा गया है कि राधा के आंसुओं ने नदी (river) जैसा रूप ले लिया है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: The friend says that Radha is 'growing thinner than the crescent' due to ___.
questions.explanation: अत्यधिक चिंता और प्रेम की व्याकुलता के कारण वह दुबली हो रही हैं।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Vidyapati is a famous poet of which language?
questions.explanation: विद्यापति मैथिली भाषा के सुप्रसिद्ध कवि हैं।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Lord Krishna is referred to as 'Madhav' in the poem. True or False?
questions.explanation: हाँ, कविता में कृष्ण को 'माधव' (Madhav) कहकर संबोधित किया गया है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: He said, 'I am busy.' (Change to Indirect Speech)
options: He said that I was busy.
He said that he was busy.
He said that he is busy.
He says that he was busy.
questions.explanation: Indirect speech में 'I' को 'He' में बदलेंगे और 'am' को 'was' में।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: She says, 'I am fine.'
options: She says that she was fine.
She says that she is fine.
She said that she is fine.
She says that I am fine.
questions.explanation: यदि Reporting Verb present में हो (says), तो अंदर का tense नहीं बदलता।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Ram said, 'I play cricket.'
options: Ram said that he plays cricket.
Ram said that he played cricket.
Ram said that I played cricket.
Ram says that he played cricket.
questions.explanation: Simple Present को Simple Past (played) में बदल दिया जाता है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: The teacher said, 'The Earth is round.'
options: The teacher said that the Earth was round.
The teacher said that the Earth is round.
The teacher says that the Earth is round.
The teacher said Earth is round.
questions.explanation: सार्वभौमिक सत्य (Universal Truth) का tense कभी नहीं बदलता।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: He said to me, 'What are you doing?'
options: He asked me what I was doing.
He asked me what was I doing.
He told me what I was doing.
He asked me what am I doing.
questions.explanation: प्रश्नवाचक वाक्यों में 'said to' को 'asked' में बदलते हैं और वाक्य simple हो जाता है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: She said, 'Please help me.'
options: She requested me to help her.
She ordered me to help her.
questions.explanation: प्रार्थना (Please) वाले वाक्यों में 'requested' का प्रयोग होता है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: He said, 'I have finished my work.'
options: He said that he had finished his work.
He said that he has finished his work.
He said that he finished his work.
He says that he had finished his work.
questions.explanation: Present Perfect (have finished) को Past Perfect (had finished) में बदलते हैं।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Ram said, 'Honesty is the best policy.'
options: Ram said that honesty was the best policy.
Ram said that honesty is the best policy.
Ram told that honesty is the best policy.
Ram says that honesty is the best policy.
questions.explanation: मुहावरे या कहावतें (Proverbs) का tense नहीं बदलता।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: The doctor said to him, 'Take your medicine.'
options: The doctor ordered him to take medicine.
The doctor advised him to take his medicine.
The doctor said that take your medicine.
The doctor told to take medicine.
questions.explanation: डॉक्टर की सलाह के लिए 'advised' का प्रयोग सबसे उपयुक्त है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: I said to him, 'Do you know me?'
options: I asked him if he knew me.
I asked him if I knew him.
I told him if he knew me.
I asked him do you know me.
questions.explanation: Yes/No questions में 'if' या 'whether' का प्रयोग होता है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: You ___ obey the rules of the road.
questions.explanation: नियमों के पालन की अनिवार्यता के लिए 'must' का प्रयोग होता है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Gillu used to sit near the author's ___.
questions.explanation: गिल्लू अक्सर लेखिका की थाली (plate) के पास बैठता था।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Which of these is the correctly spelt word?
questions.explanation: सही स्पेलिंग 'Squirrel' (गिलहरी) है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: In 'Polythene Bag', the bag makes a ___ noise.
questions.explanation: पॉलिथीन बैग 'squeaky' आवाज करता है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: What is the meaning of 'Grief' in 'Thinner Than a Crescent'?
questions.explanation: 'Grief' का अर्थ गहरा दुःख (sorrow) होता है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: She said that she ___ writing a book.
questions.explanation: Indirect speech में reporting verb past में है, तो 'was' लगेगा।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: Who wrote 'Vidyapati's Padavali'?
questions.explanation: पदावली के रचयिता विद्यापति हैं।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: In 'What is Wrong with Indian Films', the author says our films are full of ___.
questions.explanation: लेखक के अनुसार हमारी फिल्में दृश्य संबंधी घिसे-पिटे प्रयोगों (visual clichés) से भरी हैं।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: What word means 'to make a high-pitched cry' as used for crows?
questions.explanation: कौओं की आवाज के लिए 'Squawk' या 'Caw' शब्द का प्रयोग होता है।
questions.subject: English

questions.q: What 'melts' like a polythene bag with a little touch of warmth?
questions.explanation: कविता में कहा गया है कि थोड़े से प्यार की गर्माहट से दुःख (hurt) पिघल जाता है।
questions.subject: English
